title: Join with 2 AND-ed conditions where one is LIKE/ILIKE returns too many results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE c(id INTEGER, c1 TEXT, c2 TEXT, c3 INTEGER CHECK (c3 > 0));
CREATE TABLE d(d1 TEXT, d2 TEXT, d3 TEXT);
SELECT * FROM c JOIN d ON c.c1 = d.d1 WHERE c.c2 LIKE d.d2;
key_bug_features: Join with AND conditions using LIKE returns excessive results
